channel.title: Reloop Media Blog
channel.description: Notes on repurposing, distribution, and AI-era content from Reloop Media.

item.title: Why one blog post should become five different assets
item.description: Most teams treat a blog post as a finish line. The highest-leverage teams treat it as raw material — here is the breakdown we use with every client.

item.title: The 40-second rule for short-form video hooks
item.description: After cutting thousands of clips, we found the first three seconds decide almost everything. Here is how our editors choose the moment to open on.

item.title: How AI answer engines actually read your content
item.description: Structuring content for AI visibility is not the same as classic SEO. We walk through the formatting choices that make repurposed content citable.

item.title: Podcast to newsletter: a template that keeps subscribers opening
item.description: A breakdown of the newsletter structure we reuse across every podcast client, and why it consistently beats generic recap emails.

item.title: What we look for before taking on a new repurposing client
item.description: Not every piece of content is worth repurposing. Here is the checklist our strategists use during a free audit call.

item.title: Carousels vs. single-image posts: what the data actually shows
item.description: We pulled engagement data across 40+ client accounts to settle the debate on our own team.
